/usr/bin/ar qc librift.a CMakeFiles/rift_static.dir/src/core/rift.c.o CMakeFiles/rift_static.dir/src/core/token.c.o CMakeFiles/rift_static.dir/src/core/memory.c.o CMakeFiles/rift_static.dir/src/core/platform.c.o CMakeFiles/rift_static.dir/src/lang/lexer.c.o CMakeFiles/rift_static.dir/src/lang/parser.c.o CMakeFiles/rift_static.dir/src/lang/semantic.c.o CMakeFiles/rift_static.dir/src/lang/validator.c.o CMakeFiles/rift_static.dir/src/lang/codegen.c.o CMakeFiles/rift_static.dir/src/lang/emitter.c.o CMakeFiles/rift_static.dir/src/lang/pattern.c.o CMakeFiles/rift_static.dir/src/codec/codec.c.o CMakeFiles/rift_static.dir/src/codec/targets/emit_c.c.o CMakeFiles/rift_static.dir/src/codec/targets/emit_hexdump.c.o CMakeFiles/rift_static.dir/src/bridge/bridge.c.o CMakeFiles/rift_static.dir/src/bridge/trident.c.o CMakeFiles/rift_static.dir/src/bridge/ropen.c.o CMakeFiles/rift_static.dir/src/raf/raf.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib librift.a
